title: The Light Flip is a minimalist flip phone with a point to prove
summary: So Light made a flip phone, set to ship early next year. “The Light Phone in flip phone form” is even roughly the right way to think about it. Letting other people write Light software is a long time coming.
caption: output/2026-07-21/the-light-flip-is-a-minimalist-flip-phone-with-a-point-to-prove.txt
